paths.name: node:crypto
paths.message: Use @llmtxt hash_content / sign_webhook_payload via packages/llmtxt instead of node:crypto createHash/createHmac (see docs/SSOT.md)

paths.name: yjs
paths.message: CRDT work uses Yrs (Rust) via WASM, not JS CRDT libs. Import Y from packages/llmtxt instead (see docs/SSOT.md)

paths.name: automerge
paths.message: CRDT work uses Yrs (Rust) via WASM, not JS CRDT libs. Import Y from packages/llmtxt instead (see docs/SSOT.md)
